logomarkConcept: Three shapes only: an open ring (openness, no gatekeeping), a diagonal stroke exiting through the gap (mentor-guided momentum), and a small node where it lands (arrival). Never add a 4th shape or close the ring.

assets.use: Primary icon-only mark, full color, transparent background. Use anywhere the wordmark isn't needed: nav collapse state, loading spinner, mobile header, small UI badges.
Single-color black version. Use on light backgrounds where brand color isn't appropriate: invoices, legal docs, watermarks, print in one ink.
Single-color white version. Use on dark or busy/photographic backgrounds.
Mark on a rounded-square brand-gradient tile. Source file for app icons, favicons, social avatars. Do not use inline in page content — it's for icon slots only.
assets.cornerRadius: 26/120 of width (~21.7%), matches iOS/Android squircle convention closely enough to auto-mask

assets.use: Text-only lockup, dark ink. Use where the mark is already shown elsewhere on the page (e.g. next to a favicon in a browser chrome) and you just need the name.
Text-only lockup, white. For dark backgrounds.
PRIMARY LOGO. Mark + wordmark side by side, dark ink text. This is the default logo for the site header, footer, and any light-background placement.
Primary logo for dark backgrounds / dark mode. Brightened accent colors for contrast, white text.
Full lockup, single-color black. Print, stamps, one-color merch.
Full lockup, single-color white. Dark or photographic backgrounds where the two-tone version has too little contrast.
Drop into site root as /favicon.ico. Contains 16/32/48px sizes in one file.
<link rel="icon" sizes="16x16">
<link rel="icon" sizes="32x32">
Windows taskbar / legacy favicon size.
<link rel="apple-touch-icon">
PWA manifest icon (192x192 entry in manifest.json 'icons').
PWA manifest icon (512x512 entry), maskable-safe padding included.
App store / high-res source, or macOS/Windows desktop app icon source.
Chrome extension icon / small desktop app icon.
GitHub org avatar, LinkedIn/X/Twitter profile photo, Slack workspace icon. Square with brand tile background — safe for circular crop.
General-purpose transparent-background raster mark at common sizes, for anywhere an SVG can't be used (e.g. email signatures, some CMS image fields).
Transparent-background black mark, raster, for the same mono use cases as the SVG when a raster is required.
Transparent-background white mark, raster.

NOT part of the shipped brand. Alternate color directions kept for reference in case the brand direction changes later: warm-momentum (charcoal/coral/amber), indigo-amber (indigo/amber/coral), midnight-native (the dark-mode palette, standalone). Do not use these on the live site unless explicitly asked to switch direction.

implementationChecklist: Load Inter (see fonts/README.md) before rendering any wordmark or horizontal lockup SVG.
Site header/footer: use logo/svg/logo-horizontal.svg on light backgrounds, logo/svg/logo-horizontal-dark.svg on dark sections.
<head>: favicon.ico at /favicon.ico, plus favicon-16/32.png via <link rel="icon">, plus apple-touch-icon at 180px.
PWA manifest.json 'icons' array: icon-app-192.png and icon-app-512.png (purpose: 'any maskable' is safe given the tile's padding).
Import colors/tokens.css globally and reference --om-* variables instead of hardcoding brand hex values anywhere in the codebase.
Never redraw, recolor per-instance, skew, rotate, or add a drop shadow to the mark outside of the provided mono/dark variants.
